title: Foreign investors pull a record $12 billion from Indian stocks, sparked by Iran war
summary_full: Foreign investors are pulling out a record $12 billion from Indian equities as the Iran conflict drives up energy costs and raises doubts on economic growth.
summary_public: Foreign investors are pulling out a record $12 billion from Indian equities as the Iran conflict drives up energy costs and raises doubts on economic growth.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Foreign investors are pulling out a record $12 billion from Indian equities
